title: Shake your Cube!
description: A mod that lets you shake your cube to make crops and trees grow faster around you!
body:
### How it works ?
With this mod, you can sneak and move your body to grow crops and trees faster around you!

The area is 6x6 around player, work on multiplayer servers too.

Use your **Sneak key** repeatedly to grow plants faster around you like bonemeal.

### Mod configuration
Use **/shakepercentage** command to edit the percentage of chance to grow for plants.\
-> The default percentage is 10. You can change that between 5 and 100%, **ONLY IF YOUR ARE OP**.

This mod works both on client and server side.
